title: heliconia spathocircinata subsp. spathocircinata
intro: Heliconia spathocircinata subsp. spathocircinata, also known as the 'Yellow Trumpet', is a species of flowering plant in the family Heliconiaceae. This plant is known for its bright yellow, waxy flowers, which are shaped like a trumpet and have a distinctive, waxy texture. The medicinal properties of Heliconia spathocircinata subsp. spathocircinata include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health issues and provide relief from symptoms.
